revision.comment: Auto generating page. date placed far in the past so it is attributed to Immanuelle and FireflyBot sends them messages if it is ever imported to Wikipedia.
revision.text: #redirect[[en:Template:Wikitext sidebar/doc]] <noinclude>[[Category:New automatic wikipedia redirects]]</noinclude><includeonly>[[Category:Erroneous transclusions of Template:Wikitext sidebar/doc]]</includeonly>

revision.comment: 1 revision imported: importing redirects I created with chatGPT
revision.text: #redirect[[en:Template:Wikitext sidebar/doc]] <noinclude>[[Category:New automatic wikipedia redirects]]</noinclude><includeonly>[[Category:Erroneous transclusions of Template:Wikitext sidebar/doc]]</includeonly>

#redirect[[:en:Template:Wikitext sidebar/doc]] <noinclude>[[Category:New automatic wikipedia redirects]]</noinclude><includeonly>[[Category:Erroneous transclusions of Template:Wikitext sidebar/doc]]</includeonly>

{{Documentation subpage}} <!-- Add categories where indicated at the bottom of this page and interwikis at Wikidata (see [[Wikipedia:Wikidata]]) --> == Usage == <syntaxhighlight lang="wikitext"> {{Wikitext sidebar}} </syntaxhighlight>
<includeonly>{{sandbox other|| <!-- Categories below this line; interwikis at Wikidata --> [[Category:Wikipedia help templates]] [[Category:Wikipedia-internal sidebar templates]] }}</includeonly>

revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]
revision.text:
{{Documentation subpage}} <!-- Add categories where indicated at the bottom of this page and interwikis at Wikidata (see [[Wikipedia:Wikidata]]) --> == Usage == <syntaxhighlight lang="wikitext"> {{Wikitext sidebar}} </syntaxhighlight>
<includeonly>{{sandbox other|| <!-- Categories below this line; interwikis at Wikidata --> [[Category:Wikipedia help templates]] [[Category:Wikipedia-internal sidebar templates]] }}</includeonly> <noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
revision.text:
{{Documentation subpage}} <!-- Add categories where indicated at the bottom of this page and interwikis at Wikidata (see [[Wikipedia:Wikidata]]) --> == Usage == <syntaxhighlight lang="wikitext"> {{Wikitext sidebar}} </syntaxhighlight>
<includeonly>{{sandbox other|| <!-- Categories below this line; interwikis at Wikidata --> [[Category:Wikipedia help templates]] [[Category:Wikipedia-internal sidebar templates]] }}</includeonly>

revision.comment: Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
revision.text:
{{Documentation subpage}} <!-- Add categories where indicated at the bottom of this page and interwikis at Wikidata (see [[Wikipedia:Wikidata]]) --> == Usage == <syntaxhighlight lang="wikitext"> {{Wikitext sidebar}} </syntaxhighlight>
<includeonly>{{sandbox other|| <!-- Categories below this line; interwikis at Wikidata --> [[Category:Wikipedia help templates]] [[Category:Wikipedia-internal sidebar templates]] }}</includeonly> [[Category:Templates]]

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 3 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23694499169|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
{{Documentation subpage}} <!-- Add categories where indicated at the bottom of this page and interwikis at Wikidata (see [[Wikipedia:Wikidata]]) --> == Usage == <syntaxhighlight lang="wikitext"> {{Wikitext sidebar}} </syntaxhighlight>
<includeonly>{{sandbox other|| <!-- Categories below this line; interwikis at Wikidata --> }}</includeonly> <noinclude> [[Category:Wikipedia help templates]] [[Category:Wikipedia-internal sidebar templates]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: strip HTML comments [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/25015587690|time triggered pipeline]]
